evals.prompt: Sync our angular-web-common components with the latest Figma designs. Here's the component URL: https://figma.com/design/abc123/Design-System?node-id=10-20
evals.expected_output: Runs full pipeline: crawl → diff → preview → user approval → code generation. Shows preview of what will change before generating any code.

evals.prompt: 피그마에서 공통 컴포넌트 업데이트 해줘. 이 URL에서 최신 디자인 가져와.
evals.expected_output: Same pipeline in Korean context. Crawls Figma, diffs against existing, shows preview, waits for approval.
